zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillip Kynaston於1280年出生時，他的父親Gruffudd Kynaston49歲，母親Gwen verch Iorwerth21歲。他和Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1327年在英國史洛普爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillip Kynaston于1280年出生时，他的父亲Gruffudd Kynaston49岁，母亲Gwen verch Iorwerth21岁。他和Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1327年在英国史洛普爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillip Kynaston was born in 1280, his father, Gruffudd Kynaston, was 49 and his mother, Gwen verch Iorwerth, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. He died in 1327, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillip Kynaston est né en 1280, son père, Gruffudd Kynaston, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Gwen verch Iorwerth, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. Il est décédé en 1327, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillip Kynaston 1280 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd Kynaston 49 und seine Mutter Gwen verch Iorwerth 21. Er hatte mit Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Kynaston è nato il nel 1280, il suo padre, Gruffudd Kynaston, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Gwen verch Iorwerth, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. Morì nel 1327, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillip Kynastonが1280年に生まれた時，父Gruffudd Kynastonは49歳，母Gwen verch Iorwerthは21歳であった。彼はGweruilla Rogeri Vychanとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1327年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillip Kynaston(이)가 1280년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd Kynaston(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwen verch Iorwerth(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 슈럽실르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Kynaston nasceu em 1280, seu pai, Gruffudd Kynaston, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Gwen verch Iorwerth, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillip Kynaston родился в 1280 г., его отцу по имени Gruffudd Kynaston было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwen verch Iorwerth, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillip Kynaston nació en 1280, su papá, Gruffudd Kynaston, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Gwen verch Iorwerth, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Gweruilla Rogeri Vychan. Murió en 1327, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 47 años.
